name: jid-ptable

scripts.make: npm run compile && npm run fix && npm run test
scripts.compile: npx tsc -p es6 && npx tsc -p cjs
scripts.fix: cd cjs && node fix.cjs && cd ../es6 && node fix.cjs
scripts.test: npx mocha cjs/build/**.spec.cjs && npx mocha es6/build/**.spec.mjs

description: A simple method of picking between multiple options at random with an expected distribution.
